race.comment: YORGA PRIDE (6) held her own when racing in Listed company during The Pinnacles last campaign, finishing 1.2L off the winner in the Jungle Mist and jumping favourite in the Jungle Dawn. Fitter for a couple of trials and her first-up stats are awesome. Ticks plenty of boxes and can return with a bang. NICCIANA (11) led last start but couldn't fend off Hot And High who got him late in the race. He remains down in the weights here and Chris Parnham replaces the apprentice hoop. He's a horse on the rise and he can go one better third-up into the campaign. MY HIDDEN UNIVERSE (8) showed good speed in a recent trial and the inside draw is a big tick for him. Boasts a good fresh record and a soft deck looks to his liking. Can give them something to chase. EARTHSTORM (4) can improve getting out in trip today on the quick turnaround. CHARINO (3) is another who looks better suited over a longer journey today.
